behavior_summary: U8P_FLASK implements an in-game consumable item 'flask' with two visible handlers: a U8P_FLASK::look/examine handler and a U8P_FLASK::use handler.
U8P_FLASK::look is a simple examine handler that displays the short description 'flask' to the player.
U8P_FLASK::use implements the item-U8P_FLASK::use logic: it reads the item's frame/charge (via Item::getFrame) and treats the flask as empty when frame is below a threshold (interpreted as < 3).

When usable, U8P_FLASK::use selects one of three randomized outcomes (via urandom): a no-effect/empty message, a poison outcome that applies damage through METHOD::receiveHitWrapper and may spawn an auxiliary effect (spawn -> MOREFOOD::func0080) depending on the global flag shroomPaletteEffectsActive, or a healing outcome that restores HP but is capped by a stat-derived maximum (inferred cap = Npc::getStr * 2, set with Npc::setHp).
After applying an outcome, the item's frame/charge is decremented by 3 (Item::setFrame) to consume charges.
notable_control_flow: U8P_FLASK::use: guard on Item::getFrame result -> if frame < 3 show 'It's empty.' and exit.

U8P_FLASK::use: otherwise compute local2 = urandom(3) to branch into three outcomes: empty message, poison (apply damage + conditional spawn), or heal (compute heal amount using urandom and cap using Npc::getStr/Npc::getHp/Npc::setHp).
U8P_FLASK::use: finally Item::setFrame(frame - 3) is called to decrement charges regardless of branch outcome.
open_questions: Exact semantics of 'frame' (charges vs. uses vs. durability) and why the code consumes exactly 3 frame units are inferred but not explicit.
Precise numeric ranges and formulas used for poison damage and healing (urandom ranges are observed but the exact effect math and constants are inferred).
The purpose and behavior of the spawned MOREFOOD::func0080 call during poison (what object/effect is spawned) is inferred from a spawn call and a palette flag check but is not certain.
Whether U8P_FLASK::use is invoked only by player 'U8P_FLASK::use' input or can be triggered by other in-world events (engine integration detail).

main_function.name: U8P_FLASK::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player examines the flask.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player 'looks at' or examines the flask (U8P_FLASK::look/examine event).

function_map.name: U8P_FLASK::use
function_map.role: apply consumable effects (empty, poison, heal) and consume item charges

external_calls.purpose: Read the item's current frame/charge to decide if the flask is empty or usable.
Generate small random integers used to select outcome branch (urandom(3)) and to compute damage/heal amounts (e.g., urandom(8) + offset).
Apply poison damage/hit to the target when the poison outcome is selected.
Conditionally spawn/trigger an auxiliary effect/object after poison; invocation gated by shroomPaletteEffectsActive flag.
Read the target's current HP to determine heal result and whether capping is needed.
Read the target's Strength stat used to compute the healing cap (inferred cap = Str * 2).
Write the target's HP after applying healing (or enforce the cap).
Update the item's frame/charge after U8P_FLASK::use (decrement by 3 to consume charges).

reads.name: shroomPaletteEffectsActive
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether the extra spawn/effect after poison is suppressed; when false the code will spawn MOREFOOD::func0080.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_FLASK implements an in-game consumable item 'flask' with two visible handlers: a U8P_FLASK::look/examine handler and a U8P_FLASK::use handler.
